upasarga_meanings.meaning: citra citAranA spazwa rUpa se liKanA viSeza rUpa se liKanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yA keSAn praliKati tasyE KalatiH' (pA0 sU0 2362 vfttO)
'apAsyAH keSyaM malamapa SIrzaRyaM liKAt' (aTarva॰14.2.68) apa liKAt= ulliKyApAkuryAt
'yaTA dantaprakzAlanotsAdanAvaleKanAnIti' (Apa0 Da0 11285) avaleKanaM kaNkatAdinA keSAnAM viBAgenAvasTApanam
'aYjanAByaYjanonmardastryavaleKAmizaM maDu' (BA0 pu0 71212) avaleKA SarIramfjA alaNkaraRam anyatra durlaBo'trArTe prayogaH
'bahuSo'valiKeccApi vartmAsyopagataM yadi' (suSruta0 uttara0 1223) avaliKet viliKet ulliKet vartma tuRqam upagatamuccatAM gatamuparyAgatam
'nirliKitaM dArumayam' (Apa0 Da0 151712) nirliKitaM tazwaM sat prayatam
rada vileKane iti DAtupAWaH vileKanaM BedanaM Bavati kzura vileKane iti ca vileKanaM Cedanamiha vivakzitam
'viliKati rahasi kuraNgamadena BavantaM samaSaraBUtam' (gIta0 4) viliKati citramAkaroti
'niGnan proTena pfTivIM viliKaMScaraRErapi' (BA0 vana0 16719) viliKan radan utkiran
'nirBindantO ca gAtrARi viliKantO ca sAyakEH' (hari0) viliKantO kziRvantO
'CAyAtapavileKaM ca' (BA0 ASva0 454) vileKaSCidram CAyAtapO meGasantApO vileKAvutKAtArO yatreti tu nIlakaRWaH utKAtArAvityapapAWaH utKanitArAviti tu pAWaH
'mano nizWASUnyaM Bramati ca kimapyAliKati ca' (mAlatI0 131) AliKati reKA utkirati
'SfNgAByAmAliKandarpAd dvAraM dvirado yaTA' (rA0 4962) AliKan utKanan apaskiramARaH
'BUmO colliKati' (kA0 Sra0 7328) SfNgeRa BUmO reKAM karotItyevArTaH
'sa (citrakft) stamBaM vIkzya suSlakzRaM tatra gOrIM samAliKat rUpakaropi SastreRa krIqayEvollileKa tam' (kaTA0 379).. ullileKa utkIrRavAn
'alOkikatvAdamaraH svakoze na yAni nAmAni samullileKa' (trikARqa0) na samullileKa na ullileKa na nyAsa nojjahAra
'saMskArolliKito mahAmaRiriva kzIRopi na lakzyate' (SA0 65) saMskAraH SARaH saMskriyate'neneti ulliKito GfzwaH tIkzRIkftaH niSAyitaH
'iti svahastolliKitaSca mugDayA rahasyupAlaByata candraSeKaraH' (ku0 558) ulliKita AliKita citre'rpitaH

'saMmArjanopAYjanena sekenolleKanena ca gavAM ca parivAsena BUmiH SuDyati paYcaBiH' (manu0 5124).. ulleKanena KAtvA katipayamfdapanayanena mAsapaYcatiTInAM ca nimittAnAM ca sarvaSaH ulleKanamakurvARo na tasya PalaBAgBavet (Sabdakalpadrume samudDftaM tiTyAditattvam) ulleKanaM kIrtanam
'pItvA ca madyamapi cekzurasapragAQam niHSezataH kzaRamavasTitamulliKecca' (suSruta0 uttara0 4717) ulliKet vamet
'kftvApyananyasAmAnyamulleKaM nodgiranti ye' (kaTA0 78115) ulleKo leKaH utkIrya leKo vA
'Aropya cakraBramamuzRatejAstvazwreva yatnolliKito viBAti' (raGu0 632) yatnosliKitaH prayatnena SARe GfzwaH
'DAtrABiliKitAnyAhuH sarvaBUtAni karmaRA' (BA0 strI0 712) aBiliKitAni sarvato nyastAni tattallakzaREH pfTagavasTApitAni
'sPyena padaM triH pariliKati' (kA0 SrO0 7617) parito reKAM karotItyarTaH
'pariliKitaM rakzaH pariliKitA arAtayaH' (tE0 saM0 1251) pariliKitaM reKAcakreRa parivezwitam nASitamititvArTiko'rTaH
